title: Section 8
content: For the persons who immediately before the appointed day are the trustees of the following funds, that is to say,-- (a) the Imperial Bank of India Employees Provident Fund; (b) the Imperial Bank of India Employees Pension and Guarantee Fund; (c) the Bank of Bombay Officers Pension and Guarantee Fund; (d) the Bank of Madras Pension and Gratuity Fund; and (e) the Bank of Madras Officers Provident and Mutual Guarantee Fund; there shall be substituted as trustees such persons as the Central Government may, by general or special order, specify.
